adminPage.noChurch: No churches found.  Please search for a different name.
adminPage.noUsers: No users found. Please search for a different name or email.
adminPage.noteFour: Comparable software is ProPresenter.  It's $399 for a site license.  I made assumptions that the average church installs the software on 3 computers and divided our total installs by 3 to get the number of churches.  I also made the assumption that churches will upgrade to a newer version every 5 years on average.  So $399 / 5 years / 3 computers = $26.60 annual cost per computer.  If we can quantify these assumptions we should update this number.
adminPage.noteOne: Comparable software is Breeze.  They charge $72/mo or $864/year.
adminPage.noteThree: Comparable content is Orange.  They charge $1023/year for churches with 26-50 viewers for 252 Basic.
adminPage.noteTwo: Comparable software is SubSplash.  They start at $99/mo or $1200/year.  This does not include the cut they take on donations.
adminPage.subtitle: Manage server-wide settings and churches
adminPage.valueNotes: Notes on How Values are Calculated

a11y.contrastLow: Text {fg} on background {bg} has a {ratio}:1 contrast ratio, below the 4.5:1 minimum.
a11y.contrastLowHeading: Heading color {fg} on background {bg} has a {ratio}:1 contrast ratio, below the 4.5:1 minimum.
a11y.emptyButtonText: This button links to {url} but has no text label.
a11y.emptyCardText: This card links to {url} but has no title or text.
a11y.emptyLinkAnchor: A link has no readable text. Add text so its purpose is clear.
a11y.headingMultipleH1: This page has more than one H1 heading. Use a single H1 as the page title.
a11y.headingNoH1: This page has no H1 heading. Add one top-level heading as the page title.
a11y.headingSkipped: Heading level jumps from H{from} to H{to}. Increase heading levels one at a time.
a11y.missingAltGallery: Gallery image {n} is missing alt text.
a11y.missingAltImage: Image is missing alt text. Add a description so screen readers can convey it.
a11y.noIssuesDetail: Images have alt text, colors meet contrast minimums, and headings are in order.
a11y.subtitle: Fix these before publishing your page
a11y.title: Accessibility

addPage.aiPlaceholder: Example: Create a welcoming homepage with our church name, mission statement, service times, and a donation button

editorToolbar.disablePublishConfirm: Turn off publishing for this page? Edits will go live immediately again.

helpDialog.addBody: Click Add Content in the toolbar, then drag a section or element onto the page.
helpDialog.editBody: Double-click any section or element to open its settings. Click once to select and use the floating toolbar.
helpDialog.moveBody: Drag sections and elements to reorder them. Use the up/down arrows on the selection toolbar for precise moves.
helpDialog.shortcutsBody: Delete removes the selected element, Ctrl+D duplicates it, Alt+Up/Down moves it, and Esc deselects.
helpDialog.title: Page editor basics
helpDialog.undoBody: Use Ctrl+Z to undo and Ctrl+Shift+Z to redo. Open the History panel from the menu to jump to any earlier state.

descriptions.classic: A complete traditional site with a welcoming home page, about page, and plan-your-visit page.
descriptions.community: Puts groups and ministries front and center so people get connected fast.
descriptions.heritage: A classic, scripture-forward design for established congregations.
descriptions.media: Built around your live stream and message archive for churches with a strong online presence.
descriptions.modern: A contemporary look with bold gradients, online services, and a connect page.
descriptions.simple: A clean two-page starter, perfect for church plants and small congregations.
descriptions.visitor: Focused on answering a first-time guest's questions before they arrive.
